title: Assistant Store Manager - ITC Hotels - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - ITC Hotels - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
ITC Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
